title: Ubiquiti UACC-AP-AM - Wall mount for Unifi AP
description: Wall mount for Unifi Access Points. It is made from plastic and weights only 160 grams. Dimensions are 200,5 x 175,1 x 31,2 mm. Compatible devices U7-Pro U7-Pro-Max U6-Pro U6-Enterprise U6-LR UAP-AC-PRO UAP-AC-HD UAP-AC-SHD U7-Pro U7-Pro-Max U6-Pro U6-Enterprise U6-LR UAP-AC-PRO UAP-AC-HD UAP-AC-SHD
